hero.name: Enes Köksal
hero.tagline: I develop applications end-to-end, from concept to production. I primarily use .NET and TypeScript technologies, focusing on clean architecture, user-friendly interfaces, and sustainable performance in my projects.

about.label: About
about.title: Product-Oriented Engineering
about.lead: A developer who blends software engineering skills with a product vision.
paragraphs: I build sustainable, high-performance, and scalable systems. I approach projects with the responsibility of a product owner.
I place equal importance on ensuring that the code I write serves the core objectives of the business, as I do on managing technical debt and building robust architectures.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack
fullstack.desc: From database schemas to pixel-perfect interfaces.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.desc: Clean design with a focus on scalability.

bullets: Actively developing a high-performance CMS control panel using Next.js to centrally manage thousands of dynamic displays and digital content.
Creating a modular, reusable, and scalable code architecture by optimizing interface components to improve user experience.
Collaborating with backend teams to integrate RESTful APIs ensuring seamless real-time data synchronization.
Designed, developed, and delivered end-to-end web applications for 5+ enterprise clients using .NET, Nest.js, and Next.js frameworks.
Contributed to project development processes by providing technical consulting to businesses.
Successfully engineered and deployed customized software solutions for 15+ diverse clients on freelance platforms.
Built API integrations and robust architectures, maintaining a 100% client satisfaction rate across all delivered projects.
Developed a predictive maintenance machine learning model enabling early detection of robotic production faults, reducing factory downtime.
Designed and implemented 3 LLM-based automated filtering and categorization bots to automate manual data classification tasks.
Created 5+ interactive admin dashboards using QlikSense, Grafana, and PowerBI for real-time operational insights.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: You can reach out anytime to discuss an idea you have or simply to say hello.
